notableEvents.label: Alek Thomas GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Alek Thomas grounds into a double play, second baseman Brandon Lowe to shortstop Konnor Griffin to first baseman Spencer Horwitz. James McCann out at 2nd. Alek Thomas out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Jared Triolo reaches on a fielder's choice. Spencer Horwitz to 2nd. Spencer Horwitz advances to 2nd, on a fielding error by third baseman Jose Fernandez.

notableEvents.label: Jose Fernandez GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Jose Fernandez grounds into a double play, shortstop Konnor Griffin to second baseman Brandon Lowe to first baseman Spencer Horwitz. Ildemaro Vargas out at 2nd. Jose Fernandez out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Gabriel Moreno pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Gabriel Moreno grounds out, third baseman Jared Triolo to first baseman Spencer Horwitz.

notableEvents.label: Tim Tawa pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Tim Tawa grounds out sharply, shortstop Konnor Griffin to first baseman Spencer Horwitz.

notableEvents.label: Oneil Cruz plunked
notableEvents.detail: Oneil Cruz hit by pitch. Joey Bart to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Bryan Reynolds GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Bryan Reynolds grounds into a double play, second baseman Ketel Marte to shortstop Geraldo Perdomo to first baseman Ildemaro Vargas. Brandon Lowe out at 2nd. Bryan Reynolds out at 1st.
